claim_boundary: All Q2 interaction-profile fields in this plan are deterministic geometry or chemistry proxies unless evidence_source is external_backend. They are not experimental interaction evidence.

backend_contract.missing_value_semantics: Unavailable features must be omitted or null with explicit backend_status; unavailable must not be converted to numeric zero.

feature_plan.description: Fraction of generated ligand atoms with simple donor/acceptor-like atom_type and nearest pocket atom within 3.5 A.
feature_plan.backend_coverage_semantics: covered when candidate coordinates, atom_types, and parseable pocket atoms are present

feature_plan.description: Fraction of carbon-like generated ligand atoms with nearest pocket atom within 4.5 A.
feature_plan.backend_coverage_semantics: covered when candidate coordinates, atom_types, and parseable pocket atoms are present
feature_plan.fallback_when_unavailable: null; do not infer hydrophobicity without atom_types

feature_plan.description: Count of generated ligand atoms with nearest pocket atom within 4.5 A; residue identity is not claimed unless residue parsing is added.
feature_plan.backend_coverage_semantics: covered when candidate coordinates and parseable pocket atoms are present

feature_plan.description: Reserved field for fraction or count of contacts to configured key residues after residue annotations are available.
feature_plan.backend_coverage_semantics: unavailable until receptor residue ids and key-residue lists are configured
feature_plan.claim_label: unavailable in Q2 core unless configured

feature_plan.description: Fraction of generated ligand atoms whose nearest pocket atom is closer than 1.2 A.
feature_plan.backend_coverage_semantics: covered when candidate coordinates and parseable pocket atoms are present

feature_plan.description: Fraction of generated ligand atoms whose nearest pocket atom is within 4.5 A.
feature_plan.backend_coverage_semantics: covered when candidate coordinates and parseable pocket atoms are present

feature_plan.description: Distance between generated ligand centroid and parsed pocket centroid in the active coordinate frame.
feature_plan.backend_coverage_semantics: covered when candidate coordinates and parseable pocket atoms are present

integration_plan.rust_profile_contract: src/models/preference.rs InteractionProfile should preserve feature value, provenance, backend_status, and missing-evidence flags.
integration_plan.ablation_policy: Features must remain layer-attributed; raw_flow/raw_rollout, constrained_flow, repaired, reranked, and ablation layers are summarized separately.
integration_plan.training_policy: No RL/DPO or generator-level preference training is part of this plan; features may support deterministic preference pairs after backend coverage is recorded.
